identity.role: constrained CAD builder over legal WireForge attachables

validated_claims: CADForge can initialize a legal design from a declared family.
WireBlock exposes only family-declared attachables and bounded variables.
WireBlock rejects an illegal attachable before it enters the design graph.
CADForge emits a graph receipt for the current legal design state.
open_obligations: Promote the SolidWorks adapter from sketch-skeleton macro generation to named dimension and feature-template generation.
Add a visual web UI for family selection, anchor picking, attachable selection, and variable sliders.
Resolve final CAD graph nodes through GraphStax.
Bridge metamaterial_tile to MetaForge candidate evaluation.
Add local persistence and USB appliance packaging.
notes: CADForge is the product-facing constrained CAD tool. WireBlock is the legality engine that keeps design inside initialized families, legal attachables, and declared variable ranges.
